mapper.select:
SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_SMS_SEND_DATE_KT_IDX) */ SMS_SEQ, TO_CHAR(SMS_SEND_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') SMS_SEND_DATE, SMS_MSG, CALLING_NUMBER, CALLED_NUMBER, SMS_STATUS, SMS_RESULT_CODE, TO_CHAR(SMS_RESULT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') SMS_RESULT_DATE, ADMIN_ID, SMS_SRC, SMS_METHOD, SMS_GUBUN, PIN_NUMBER, OPEN_AGENT_ID, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RECORD_DATE, TO_CHAR(NVL(CONTRACT_NUM,0),'9999999999') CONTRACT_NUM, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_SMS','SMS_RESULT_CODE', TRIM(SMS_RESULT_CODE)) SMS_RESULT_NM FROM PPS_SMS A WHERE SMS_SEND_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND SMS_SEND_DATE < SYSDATE
and contract_num = #{searchNm}
and called_number = REPLACE(#{searchNm},'-','')
and sms_send_date >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
and sms_send_date < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')+1

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_SMS_SEND_DATE_IDX) */ SMS_SEQ, NVL(TO_CHAR(SMS_SEND_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'-') SMS_SEND_DATE, NVL(SMS_MSG,'-') SMS_MSG, NVL(CALLING_NUMBER,'-') CALLING_NUMBER, NVL(CALLED_NUMBER,'-') CALLED_NUMBER, NVL(SMS_STATUS,'-') SMS_STATUS, NVL(SMS_RESULT_CODE,'-') SMS_RESULT_CODE, NVL(TO_CHAR(SMS_RESULT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'-') SMS_RESULT_DATE, NVL(ADMIN_ID,'-') ADMIN_ID, NVL(SMS_SRC,'-') SMS_SRC, NVL(SMS_METHOD,'-') SMS_METHOD, NVL(SMS_GUBUN,'-') SMS_GUBUN, NVL(PIN_NUMBER,'-') PIN_NUMBER, NVL(OPEN_AGENT_ID,'-') OPEN_AGENT_ID, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RECORD_DATE, NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_SMS','SMS_RESULT_CODE', TRIM(SMS_RESULT_CODE)), NVL(TRIM(SMS_RESULT_CODE), '-')) SMS_RESULT_NM FROM PPS_SMS A WHERE SMS_SEND_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND SMS_SEND_DATE < SYSDATE
and contract_num = #{searchNm}
and called_number = REPLACE(#{searchNm},'-','')
and sms_send_date >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
and sms_send_date < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')+1

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_SMS_SEND_DATE_IDX) */ SMS_SEQ, TO_CHAR(SMS_SEND_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') SMS_SEND_DATE, SMS_MSG, CALLING_NUMBER, CALLED_NUMBER, SMS_STATUS, SMS_RESULT_CODE, TO_CHAR(SMS_RESULT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') SMS_RESULT_DATE, ADMIN_ID, SMS_SRC, SMS_METHOD, SMS_GUBUN, PIN_NUMBER, OPEN_AGENT_ID, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RECORD_DATE, TO_CHAR(NVL(CONTRACT_NUM,0),'9999999999') CONTRACT_NUM, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_SMS','SMS_RESULT_CODE', TRIM(SMS_RESULT_CODE)) SMS_RESULT_NM FROM PPS_SMS_OLD A WHERE SMS_SEND_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND SMS_SEND_DATE < SYSDATE
and contract_num = #{searchNm}
and called_number = REPLACE(#{searchNm},'-','')
and sms_send_date >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
and sms_send_date < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')+1

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_SMS_SEND_DATE_IDX) */ SMS_SEQ, NVL(TO_CHAR(SMS_SEND_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'-') SMS_SEND_DATE, NVL(SMS_MSG,'-') SMS_MSG, NVL(CALLING_NUMBER,'-') CALLING_NUMBER, NVL(CALLED_NUMBER,'-') CALLED_NUMBER, NVL(SMS_STATUS,'-') SMS_STATUS, NVL(SMS_RESULT_CODE,'-') SMS_RESULT_CODE, NVL(TO_CHAR(SMS_RESULT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'-') SMS_RESULT_DATE, NVL(ADMIN_ID,'-') ADMIN_ID, NVL(SMS_SRC,'-') SMS_SRC, NVL(SMS_METHOD,'-') SMS_METHOD, NVL(SMS_GUBUN,'-') SMS_GUBUN, NVL(PIN_NUMBER,'-') PIN_NUMBER, NVL(OPEN_AGENT_ID,'-') OPEN_AGENT_ID, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RECORD_DATE, NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_SMS','SMS_RESULT_CODE', TRIM(SMS_RESULT_CODE)), NVL(TRIM(SMS_RESULT_CODE), '-')) SMS_RESULT_NM FROM PPS_SMS_OLD A WHERE SMS_SEND_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND SMS_SEND_DATE < SYSDATE
and contract_num = #{searchNm}
and called_number = REPLACE(#{searchNm},'-','')
and sms_send_date >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
and sms_send_date < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')+1

SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum, A.SOC AS soc, A.SERVICE_TYPE AS serviceType, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SERVICE_TYPE', A.SERVICE_TYPE) AS serviceTypeName, TO_CHAR(A.ENTER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS enterDate, TO_CHAR(A.STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS statusStopDt, A.STATUS_STOP_CD AS statusStopCd, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'STATUS_STOP_CD', A.STATUS_STOP_CD) AS statusStopNm, TO_CHAR(A.STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS statusCancelDt, A.STATUS_CANCEL_CD AS statusCancelCd, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'STATUS_CANCEL_CD', A.STATUS_CANCEL_CD) AS statusCancelNm, F_PPS_NUMBER_FORMAT(A.BASIC_REMAINS) AS basicRemainsStr, TO_CHAR(A.BASIC_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS basicExpire, TO_CHAR(A.BASIC_EMPT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS basicEmptDt, A.VOICE_RATE AS voiceRate, A.DATA_REG AS dataReg, TO_CHAR(A.DATA_REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS dataRegDt, A.DATA_MODE AS DataMode, A.DATA_SERVICE_CODE AS dataServiceCode, A.DATA_QUOTA AS dataQuota, A.DATA_QUOTA_REMAINS AS dataQuotaRemains, A.DATA_VA_REMAINS AS dataVaRemains, TO_CHAR(A.DATA_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS dataExpire, A.DATA_LIMIT AS datalimit, A.LAST_KT_IN_MODE AS lastKtInMode, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_KT_SYN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lastKtSynDt, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lastBasicChgDt , TO_CHAR(A.LAST_DATA_CHG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lastDataChgDt, A.POINT AS point, A.POINT_LAST_DT AS pointLastDt, TRUNC(A.US_LC_VOICE/60,0) AS usLcVoice, A.US_LC_SMS AS usLcSms, A.US_LC_DATA AS usLcData, A.US_LC_LAST_DATE AS usLcLastDate, A.TOTAL_POINT AS totalPoint, A.TOTAL_BASIC_CHG AS totalBasicChg, A.TOTAL_BASIC_CNT AS totalBasicCnt, A.TOTAL_DATA_CHG AS totalDataChg, A.TOTAL_DATA_CNT AS totalDataCnt, A.RECHARGE_FLAG AS rechargeFlag, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'RECHARGE_FLAG', A.RECHARGE_FLAG), '미등록') AS rechargeFlagNm, A.RECHARGE_FLAG_DT AS rechargeFlagDt, A.SMS_PHONE AS smsPhone, A.SMS_PHONE AS smsPhoneMsk, A.SMS_FLAG AS smsFlag, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SMS_FLAG', A.SMS_FLAG), '미등록') AS smsFlagNm, A.RENTAL_STATUS AS rentalStatus, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'RENTAL_STATUS', A.RENTAL_STATUS), '미등록') AS rentalStatusNm, TO_CHAR(A.RENTAL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rentalDt, A.VIR_ACCOUNT_ID AS virAccountId, '' AS virAccountName, A.CMS_CHARGE_TYPE AS cmsChargeType, A.CMS_BANK_CODE AS cmsBankCode, A.CMS_ACCOUNT AS cmsAccount, A.CMS_ACCOUNT AS cmsAccountMsk, A.CMS_USER_NAME AS cmsUserName, A.CMS_USER_NAME AS cmsUserNameMsk, A.CMS_CHARGE AS cmsCharge, A.CMS_TRY_REMAINS AS cmsTryRemains, A.CMS_CHARGE_DATE AS cmsChargeDate, A.CMS_CHARGE_MONTH AS cmsChargeMonth, A.PAPER_IMAGE_1 AS paperImage1, A.PAPER_IMAGE_2 AS paperImage2, A.PAPER_IMAGE_3 AS paperImage3, A.PAPER_IMAGE_4 AS paperImage4, A.PAPER_IMAGE_5 AS paperImage5, DECODE(A.PAPER_IMAGE_1,'','X','O' ) AS paperImg1, DECODE(A.PAPER_IMAGE_2,'','X','O' ) AS paperImg2, DECODE(A.PAPER_IMAGE_3,'','X','O' ) AS paperImg3, DECODE(A.PAPER_IMAGE_4,'','X','O' ) AS paperImg4, DECODE(A.PAPER_IMAGE_5,'','X','O' ) AS paperImg5, F_GET_CUSTOMER_IMAGE_COUNT(A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS paperImg, A.AD_NAME As adName, A.AD_NAME As adNameMsk, A.AD_SSN AS adSsn, A.AD_SSN AS adSsnMsk, A.AD_ADDRESS AS adAddress, A.AD_ADDRESS AS adAddressMsk, A.AD_NATION AS adNation, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'AD_NATION', A.AD_NATION), '미등록') AS adNationNm, A.LANG_CODE AS langCode, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'LANG_CODE', A.LANG_CODE), '미등록') AS langCodeNm, A.WWW_REG_FLAG AS wwwRegFlag, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'WWW_REG_FLAG', A.WWW_REG_FLAG) AS wwwRegFlagNm, TO_CHAR(A.WWW_REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS wwwRegDt, A.AGENT_ID AS agentId, FN_GET_ORGNM(AGENT_ID) AS agentNm, TO_CHAR(A.AGENT_CH_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS agentChDt, A.ADMIN_ID AS AdminId, FN_GET_ORGNM(A.ADMIN_ID) AS adminNm, TO_CHAR(A.ADMIN_CH_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS adminChDt, A.REMARK AS remark, A.AGENT_SALE_ID AS agentSaleId, FN_GET_ORGNM(A.AGENT_SALE_ID) AS agentSaleNm, A.AGENT_SALE_ADMIN AS agentSaleAdmin, FN_GET_ORGNM(A.AGENT_SALE_ADMIN) AS agentSaleAdminNm, TO_CHAR(A.AGENT_SALE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS agentSaleDate, NVL(VIZA_FLAG, 'N') AS vizaFlag, TO_CHAR(STAY_EXPIR_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') stayExpirDt, CASE WHEN STAY_EXPIR_DT IS NOT NULL AND STAY_EXPIR_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE -14) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END stayExpirFlag, (SELECT RCG_AMT FROM PPS_CODE_SERVICE_TOPUP WHERE SOC = A.SOC AND KT_MODE <> 'KT_REFILL' AND TYPE = 'F' AND ROWNUM = 1) as topupRcgAmt, (SELECT 'Y' FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_WAR WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND DEL_YN = 'N') warFlag FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT CUSTOMER_SSN AS customerSsn, CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CUSTOMER_SSN) AS customerSsnMsk, TAX_ID AS taxId, DRIVR_LICNS_NO AS driverLicnsNo, DRIVR_LICNS_NO AS driverLicnsNoMsk, CUSTOMER_TYPE AS customerType, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO', 'CUSTOMER_TYPE', CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS customerTypeNm, CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS customerLinkName, CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS customerLinkNameMsk, CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD custIdntNoIndCd, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO', 'CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD', CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD) custIdntNoIndCdNm FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}

SELECT CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, BAN AS customerBan , SUB_STATUS AS subStatus, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO', 'SUB_STATUS', SUB_STATUS) AS subStatusNm, LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS lstComActvDate, SUB_STATUS_DATE AS subStatusDate, DEALER_CODE AS dealerCode, SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo, SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNoMsk, SRL_IF_ID AS srlIfId, USER_SSN userSsn, CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN) userSsnMsk, SUB_ADR_ZIP subAdrZip, SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN subAdrPrimaryLn, SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN subAdrSecondaryLn, SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN subAdrSecondaryLnMsk, SUB_LINK_NAME subLinkName, SUB_LINK_NAME subLinkNameMsk, MODEL_NAME modelName, ICC_ID iccId, ICC_ID iccIdMsk, IMEI imei, INTM_SRL_NO intmSrlNo, INTM_SRL_NO intmSrlNoMsk, MNP_IND_CD mnpIndCd, DECODE(MNP_IND_CD, '', '신규', '이동') mnpIndCdNm FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT BAN_LINK_NAME AS banLinkName, BAN_LINK_NAME AS banLinkNameMsk, BL_BILLING_METHOD AS blBillingMethod, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO', 'BL_BILLING_METHOD', BL_BILLING_METHOD) AS blBillingMethodNm, BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE AS blSpclBanCode, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO', 'BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE', BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE) AS blSpclBanCodeNm, BAN_ADR_ZIP AS banAdrZip, BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN AS banAdrPrimaryLn, BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS banAdrSecondaryLn, BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN AS banAdrSecondaryLnMsk, BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID AS bankAcctHolderId, CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID) AS bankAcctHolderIdMsk, COL_DELINQ_STATUS AS colDelinqStatus, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO', 'COL_DELINQ_STATUS', COL_DELINQ_STATUS) AS coldelinqStatusNm, EVNT_CD AS eventCd, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO', 'EVNT_CD', EVNT_CD) AS eventNm, EVNT_TRTM_NO AS evntTrtmNo, EVNT_TRTM_DT AS evntTrtmDt FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO WHERE BAN = #{customerBan}
SELECT RATE_CD rateCd, RATE_NM rateNm, TRUNC(A.BASE_AMT/30,0) AS monthlyFee FROM MSP_RATE_MST A WHERE A.RATE_CD =#{soc} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS rcgCnt, SUM(AMOUNT) AS sumAmout FROM PPS_RCG WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND CANCEL_FLAG = 'N' AND KT_RES_CODE = '0000'

SELECT nvl((select cd_dsc from cmn_grp_cd_mst where grp_id='RCP9000' and cd_val= soc),soc||'(*)' ) text, SOC value FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND EXPIRATION_DATE > EFFECTIVE_DATE AND SERVICE_TYPE <> 'P'

SELECT A.VAC_ID AS vacId, A.VAC_BANK_CD AS vacBankCd, f_get_kt_code_nm('PPS_VAC', 'BANK_CODE', A.VAC_BANK_CD) AS vacNm, A.USER_TYPE AS userType, A.ADMIN_ID AS adminId, A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum, A.AGENT_ID AS agentId, A.STATUS AS status, TO_CHAR(A.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS openDate, TO_CHAR(A.CLOSE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS closeDate, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_PAYMENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lastPaymentDate, A.PAY_COUNT AS payCount, A.USE_COUNT AS useCount FROM PPS_VAC A WHERE A.USER_TYPE = 'U' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT CMS_SEQ, TO_CHAR(REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REQ_DATE, REQ_NO, RES_CODE, F_GET_REAL_CMS_CODE_NM(RES_CODE) RES_CODE_NAME, TO_CHAR(RES_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') RES_DATE, SUCC_FLAG, BANK_CODE, BANK_ACCOUNT, BANK_PEOPLE_ID, BANK_USER_NAME, CONTRACT_NUM, CHARGE_SEQ, REQ_AMOUNT, RES_AMOUNT, CHARGE_FEE, TRY_CNT, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') RECORD_DATE, RECHARGE_RESULT, TO_CHAR(RECHARGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') RECHARGE_DATE, TO_CHAR(CMS_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CMS_START_DATE, CMS_TYPE, RCG_SEQ, ADMIN_ID, KT_RES_CD, KT_RES_MSG FROM PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS WHERE CMS_SEQ > 0 AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} ORDER BY REQ_DATE DESC

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_RCG_IDX2) */ SEQ, SUBSCRIBER_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, REQ_SRC, REQ_TYPE, RECHARGE_INFO, RECHARGE_METHOD, AMOUNT, IN_AMOUNT, KT_RES_CODE, TO_CHAR(KT_RES_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') KT_RES_DT, ADMIN_ID, RECHARGE_AGENT, CHG_TYPE, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG','CHG_TYPE',CHG_TYPE) CHG_TYPE_NAME, CANCEL_FLAG, TO_CHAR(CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CANCEL_DT, BASIC_REMAINS, FREE_FLAG, DECODE(FREE_FLAG,'N','판매', 'Y','수수료', '-') FREE_FLAG_NM, TO_CHAR(BASIC_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BASIC_EXPIRE FROM PPS_RCG A WHERE RECHARGE_DATE > TO_DATE('2014-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_SMS_IDX2) */ SMS_SEQ, TO_CHAR(SMS_SEND_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') SMS_SEND_DATE, SMS_MSG, CALLING_NUMBER, CALLED_NUMBER, SMS_STATUS, SMS_RESULT_CODE, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_SMS','SMS_RESULT_CODE', TRIM(SMS_RESULT_CODE)) SMS_RESULT_NM, TO_CHAR(SMS_RESULT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') SMS_RESULT_DATE, ADMIN_ID, SMS_SRC, SMS_METHOD, SMS_GUBUN, PIN_NUMBER, OPEN_AGENT_ID, TO_CHAR(RECORD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RECORD_DATE, CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_SMS A WHERE SMS_SEND_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY_IDX2) */ DIARY_ID, A.CONTRACT_NUM, REQ_USER_NAME, REQ_USER_GUBUN, REQ_TYPE, REQ_BODY, F_STRING_FORMAT(REQ_BODY,7) AS REQ_BODY_SHOW, RES_STATUS, RES_BODY, F_STRING_FORMAT(RES_BODY,7) AS RES_BODY_SHOW, RES_ADMIN, FN_GET_USRNM(RES_ADMIN) RES_ADMIN_NM, TO_CHAR(RES_ING_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') RES_ING_DATE, TO_CHAR(RES_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') RES_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DATE, REG_ADMIN, FN_GET_USRNM(REG_ADMIN) REG_ADMIN_NM, REMARK, STATUS, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','REQ_USER_GUBUN', REQ_USER_GUBUN) AS REQ_USER_GUBUN_NM, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','REQ_TYPE', REQ_TYPE) AS REQ_TYPE_NM, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','RES_STATUS', RES_STATUS) AS RES_STATUS_NM, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','STATUS', STATUS) AS STATUS_NM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND REG_DATE > TO_DATE('2014-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT DIARY_ID AS diaryId , CONTRACT_NUM AS contractnum , REQ_USER_NAME AS reqUserName , REQ_USER_GUBUN AS reqUserGubun , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','REQ_USER_GUBUN', REQ_USER_GUBUN) AS reqUserGubunNm , REQ_TYPE AS reqType , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','REQ_TYPE', REQ_TYPE) AS reqTypeNm , REQ_BODY AS reqBody , RES_STATUS AS resStatus , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','RES_STATUS', RES_STATUS) AS resStatusNm , RES_BODY AS resBody , RES_ADMIN AS resAdmin , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(RES_ADMIN) AS resAdminNm , TO_CHAR(RES_ING_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resIngDate , TO_CHAR(RES_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resEndDate , TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate , REG_ADMIN AS regAdmin , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN) AS regAdminNm , REMARK AS remark , STATUS AS status , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','STATUS', STATUS) AS statusNm FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY WHERE DIARY_ID = #{diaryId}

SELECT A.MNG_CODE, A.PIN_NUMBER, A.EXPIRE_DATE, A.PIN_GUBUN, A.ONOFF_GUBUN, A.STATUS, A.START_PRICE, A.NOW_PRICE, A.CR_ADMIN_ID, A.CR_DATE, A.CR_SN, A.CR_SEQ, A.OUT_FLAG, A.OUT_DATE, A.OUT_ADMIN_ID, A.OUT_AGENT_TYPE, A.OUT_AGENT_ID, A.OUT_DEALER_ID, A.OUT_PRICE, A.OUT_SEQ, A.OPEN_FLAG, A.OPEN_ADMIN_ID, A.OPEN_DATE, A.OPEN_SEQ, A.SALE_FLAG, A.SALE_ADMIN_ID, A.SALE_DATE, A.SALE_SEQ, A.RCG_FLAG, A.RCG_DATE, A.RCG_SEQ, A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.REMARK FROM PPS_PIN_INFO A WHERE A.PIN_NUMBER = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(#{pinNumber})

select cd value, cd_nm text from pps_kt_common_cd where table_nm = 'PPS_CUSTOMER' and col = 'AD_NATION'
AND CD_NM LIKE ('%' || #{adNationStr} || '%')
order by info asc, cd_nm asc
select cd value, cd_nm text from pps_kt_common_cd where table_nm = 'PPS_CUSTOMER' and col = 'LANG_CODE' and (cd is null or cd = '01' or cd = '02')
select orgn_id value, orgn_nm text from org_orgn_info_mst where ORGN_LVL_CD = '10'
select vac_bank_cd value, f_get_kt_code_nm('PPS_VAC', 'BANK_CODE', vac_bank_cd) text from pps_vac group by vac_bank_cd
select RATE_CD value, RATE_NM text from MSP_RATE_MST where PAY_CL_CD = 'PP'
select ADDITION_KEY value , ADDITION_NAME text from mcp_addition@dl_mcp
SELECT VAC_BANK_CD, f_get_kt_code_nm('PPS_VAC', 'BANK_CODE', VAC_BANK_CD) VAC_BANK_NM, VAC_ID FROM PPS_VAC WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT A.CMS_CHARGE_TYPE AS cmsChargeType, CMS_BANK_CODE AS cmsBankCode, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS', 'BANK_CODE', CMS_BANK_CODE) AS cmsBankCodeNm, CMS_ACCOUNT AS cmsAccount, CMS_USER_NAME AS cmsUserName, SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CMS_USER_SSN), 1, 7) AS cmsUserSsn, CMS_CHARGE AS cmsCharge, CMS_TRY_REMAINS AS cmsTryRemains, CMS_CHARGE_DATE AS cmsChargeDate, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH AS cmsChargeMonth, SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT DIARY_ID diaryId, A.CONTRACT_NUM contractNum, REQ_USER_NAME reqUserName, REQ_USER_GUBUN reqUserGubun, REQ_TYPE reqType, REQ_BODY reqBody, F_STRING_FORMAT(REQ_BODY,7) AS reqBodyShow, RES_STATUS resStatus, RES_BODY resBody, F_STRING_FORMAT(RES_BODY,7) AS resBodyShow, RES_ADMIN resAdmin, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(RES_ADMIN) resAdminNm, TO_CHAR(RES_ING_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') resIngDate, TO_CHAR(RES_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') resEndDate, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') regDate, REG_ADMIN regAdmin, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN) regAdminNm, REMARK remark, STATUS status, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','REQ_USER_GUBUN', REQ_USER_GUBUN) AS reqUserGubunNm, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','REQ_TYPE', REQ_TYPE) AS reqTypeNm, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','RES_STATUS', RES_STATUS) AS resStatusNm, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY','STATUS', STATUS) AS statusNm, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO subscriberNo FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_DIARY A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND DIARY_ID = #{diaryId}
SELECT CD value, CD_NM text FROM PPS_KT_COMMON_CD WHERE TABLE_NM = 'PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS' AND COL = 'BANK_CODE'

SELECT AGNT_DP_RCG_FLAG AS agntDpRcgFlag, AGNT_DP_RCG_REMAINS AS agntDpRcgRemains, AGNT_DP_RCG_CHARGE AS agntDpRcgCharge, AGNT_DP_RCG_CNT AS agntDpRcgCnt, AGNT_DP_RCG_NOW_CNT AS agntDpRcgNowCnt FROM pps_customer WHERE contract_num = #{contractNum}

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_REAL_PAYINFO_IDX) */ SEQ, A.CONTRACT_NUM, STATUS , CMS_TYPE , REG_TYPE , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_REAL_PAYINFO','REG_TYPE', REG_TYPE) REG_TYPE_NM, FILE_TYPE , FILE_LEN , TO_CHAR(USER_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') USER_DT, USER_STATUS , TO_CHAR(FILE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FILE_DT , TO_CHAR(FILE_CAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FILE_CAN_DT, FILE_STATUS , REC_ID , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REC_ID) REC_ID_NM, TO_CHAR(REC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REC_DT , CMS_CHARGE_TYPE , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER','CMS_CHARGE_TYPE',CMS_CHARGE_TYPE) CMS_CHARGE_TYPE_NM, CMS_BANK_CODE , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS', 'BANK_CODE', CMS_BANK_CODE) CMS_BANK_CODE_NM, CMS_USER_NAME, DECODE(SEQ, '', 'N', 'Y') PAYINFO_FLAG FROM PPS_REAL_PAYINFO A, PPS_CUSTOMER B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND REC_DT > TO_DATE('20150101', 'YYYYMMDD')
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT SEQ, A.CONTRACT_NUM, STATUS , CMS_TYPE , REG_TYPE , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_REAL_PAYINFO','REG_TYPE', REG_TYPE) REG_TYPE_NM, FILE_TYPE , FILE_LEN , TO_CHAR(USER_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') USER_DT, USER_STATUS , TO_CHAR(FILE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FILE_DT , TO_CHAR(FILE_CAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FILE_CAN_DT, FILE_STATUS , REC_ID , F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REC_ID) REC_ID_NM, TO_CHAR(REC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REC_DT , CMS_CHARGE_TYPE , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER','CMS_CHARGE_TYPE',CMS_CHARGE_TYPE) CMS_CHARGE_TYPE_NM, CMS_BANK_CODE , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS', 'BANK_CODE', CMS_BANK_CODE) CMS_BANK_CODE_NM, CMS_USER_NAME, DECODE(SEQ, '', 'N', 'Y') PAYINFO_FLAG FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A, PPS_REAL_PAYINFO B, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND ENTER_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND SUB_STATUS IN ('A', 'S') AND CMS_BANK_CODE IS NOT NULL AND CMS_ACCOUNT IS NOT NULL AND CMS_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL AND CMS_USER_SSN IS NOT NULL
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
and REC_DT >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyymmdd')
and REC_DT < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyymmdd')+1
and CMS_BANK_CODE = #{searchRcgCmsBankNm}
AND SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND SEQ IS NULL
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchSValue}
AND REC_ID IN (SELECT USR_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_NM LIKE TRIM('%' || #{searchSValue} || '%') )
AND A.CMS_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
AND B.REC_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
ORDER BY REC_DT DESC

SELECT NVL(SEQ, 0) SEQ, NVL(A.CONTRACT_NUM, '-') CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(STATUS, '-') STATUS, NVL(CMS_TYPE, '-') CMS_TYPE, NVL(REG_TYPE, '-')REG_TYPE , NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_REAL_PAYINFO','REG_TYPE', REG_TYPE), '-') REG_TYPE_NM, NVL(FILE_TYPE, '-') FILE_TYPE, NVL(FILE_LEN, '-') FILE_LEN, NVL(TO_CHAR(USER_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '-') USER_DT, NVL(USER_STATUS, '-') USER_STATUS , NVL(TO_CHAR(FILE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '-') FILE_DT , NVL(TO_CHAR(FILE_CAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') FILE_CAN_DT, NVL(FILE_STATUS, '-') FILE_STATUS, NVL(REC_ID, '-') REC_ID, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REC_ID), '-') REC_ID_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(REC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '-') REC_DT , NVL(CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, '-') CMS_CHARGE_TYPE, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER','CMS_CHARGE_TYPE',CMS_CHARGE_TYPE), '-') CMS_CHARGE_TYPE_NM, NVL(CMS_BANK_CODE, '-') CMS_BANK_CODE, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS', 'BANK_CODE', CMS_BANK_CODE), '-') CMS_BANK_CODE_NM, NVL(CMS_USER_NAME, '-') CMS_USER_NAME, DECODE(SEQ, '', 'N', 'Y') PAYINFO_FLAG FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A, PPS_REAL_PAYINFO B, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND ENTER_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND SUB_STATUS IN ('A', 'S') AND CMS_BANK_CODE IS NOT NULL AND CMS_ACCOUNT IS NOT NULL AND CMS_USER_NAME IS NOT NULL AND CMS_USER_SSN IS NOT NULL
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
and REC_DT >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyymmdd')
and REC_DT < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyymmdd')+1
and CMS_BANK_CODE = #{searchRcgCmsBankNm}
AND SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND SEQ IS NULL
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchSValue}
AND REC_ID IN (SELECT USR_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_NM LIKE TRIM('%' || #{searchSValue} || '%') )
AND A.CMS_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
AND B.REC_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchSValue} || '%'
ORDER BY REC_DT DESC
select RATE_CD value, RATE_NM text from MSP_RATE_MST where PAY_CL_CD = 'PP' and RATE_CD IN (SELECT SOC FROM PPS_CODE_SERVICE_TOPUP WHERE KT_MODE <> 'TOPUP_REFILL')
